narrative:
Washington-Central (precinct in Pickaway County) has 469 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.9 percentage points.
